prompt: A manufacturing company produced 500 units of a product. Each unit cost $15 to produce. The company sold the first 200 units at $30 each. The next 150 units were sold at a discounted price of $25 per unit. The remaining units were sold at an even greater discount of $20 per unit. In addition to production costs, the company incurred a fixed overhead of $2000 for the entire production run. What was the company's total net profit?
